recommendations.title: Psych 2: Lassie Come Home
recommendations.overview: After Santa Barbara Police Chief Carlton Lassiter is ambushed and left for dead, Shawn and Gus return to help him and find themselves embroiled in a case involving the personal, the professional – and even the supernatural.

recommendations.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
recommendations.overview: Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic when her fiancé dies in a bungee jumping accident.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: L.A. Confidential
recommendations.overview: Three detectives in the corrupt and brutal L.A. police force of the 1950s use differing methods to uncover a conspiracy behind the shotgun slayings of the patrons at an all-night diner.

recommendations.title: Murder Mystery 2
recommendations.overview: After starting their own detective agency, Nick and Audrey Spitz land a career-making case when their billionaire pal is kidnapped from his wedding.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 3
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their patriarch Gus, the Portokalos family travels to Greece for a family reunion, and to deliver Gus' journal to his old friends.
